evals.prompt: Use the backlog refiner workflow: resolve the repo from git remote, list open issues on axelixlabs/axelix, and identify up to 5 likely-stale issues with codebase evidence.
evals.expected_output: Report follows the skill template with owner/repo from origin, GH API or gh usage, filtered issues-only, staleness justified by code exploration—not only dates—including any superseded-solution cases.

evals.prompt: Our backlog has issues that propose migrating to library X, but we chose library Y instead. Walk through how you'd mark those issues stale and what evidence you'd cite from the repo.
evals.expected_output: Explains superseded-approach criterion, concrete search strategy in codebase, report fields (evidence paths, suggested close reason).

evals.prompt: Fetch only open issues updated before 2025-01-01 for this repo's origin and flag any that look stale after checking related code.
evals.expected_output: Uses API filtering or client-side filter by updated_at; still requires code verification for staleness; notes undetermined when evidence is missing.
